documents.text: ADS1115 ADC: 16-bit 4-channel ADC with programmable gain amplifier. Outputs: channel_0(float), channel_1(float), channel_2(float), channel_3(float) Config: i2c_address=0x48, gain=GAIN_ONE, data_rate=128, active_channels=4, read_interval=500. Category: sensor. Libraries: adafruit/Adafruit ADS1X15@^2.5.0.

metadata.name: ADS1115 ADC
metadata.description: 16-bit 4-channel ADC with programmable gain amplifier.

documents.text: BH1750 Light Sensor: Digital ambient light sensor with auto-ranging lux measurement. Outputs: lux(float) Config: i2c_address=0x23, mode=continuous_high, read_interval=1000. Category: sensor. Libraries: claws/BH1750@^1.3.0.

metadata.name: BH1750 Light Sensor
metadata.description: Digital ambient light sensor with auto-ranging lux measurement.

documents.text: BME280: Temperature, humidity, and pressure sensor with proper I2C initialization. Outputs: temperature(float), humidity(float), pressure(float), altitude(float) Config: i2c_address=0x76, sda_pin=21, scl_pin=22, sea_level_hpa=1013.25, read_interval=2000, output_unit=celsius. Category: sensor. Libraries: adafruit/Adafruit BME280 Library@^2.2.0, adafruit/Adafruit Unified Sensor@^1.1.9.

metadata.name: BME280
metadata.description: Temperature, humidity, and pressure sensor with proper I2C initialization.

documents.text: BMP280 Barometric Pressure: I2C barometric pressure and temperature sensor. Measures atmospheric pressure and altitude. Outputs: pressure(float), temperature(float), altitude(float) Config: i2c_address=0x76, sda_pin=21, scl_pin=22. Category: sensor. Libraries: adafruit/Adafruit BMP280 Library@^2.6.8.

metadata.name: BMP280 Barometric Pressure
metadata.description: I2C barometric pressure and temperature sensor. Measures atmospheric pressure and altitude.

documents.text: DHT22 Temperature & Humidity: Digital temperature and humidity sensor. Reads temperature (-40 to 80°C) and humidity (0-100%RH). Outputs: temperature(float), humidity(float) Config: pin=4, read_interval=2000. Category: sensor. Libraries: adafruit/DHT sensor library@^1.4.4, adafruit/Adafruit Unified Sensor@^1.1.9.

metadata.name: DHT22 Temperature & Humidity
metadata.description: Digital temperature and humidity sensor. Reads temperature (-40 to 80°C) and humidity (0-100%RH).

configuration.description: GPIO pin connected to DHT22 data

Outputs: bus_voltage(float), current_ma(float), power_mw(float), shunt_voltage(float) Config: i2c_address=0x40, shunt_resistance=0.1, max_current=3.2, read_interval=1000. Category: sensor. Libraries: adafruit/Adafruit INA219@^1.2.0.

metadata.name: INA219 Power Monitor
metadata.description: High-side current, voltage, and power measurement sensor.

Outputs: accel_x(float), accel_y(float), accel_z(float), gyro_x(float), gyro_y(float), gyro_z(float), temperature(float) Config: i2c_address=0x68, sda_pin=21, scl_pin=22, accel_range=2, gyro_range=250, read_interval=100. Category: sensor. Libraries: adafruit/Adafruit MPU6050@^2.2.0, adafruit/Adafruit Unified Sensor@^1.1.9.

metadata.name: MPU6050 IMU
metadata.description: 6-axis accelerometer and gyroscope with DMP support.

metadata.name: VL53L0X Distance
metadata.description: Time-of-Flight laser distance sensor, range up to 2m.

documents.text: BLE Server: Bluetooth Low Energy GATT server with read/write characteristics. Inputs: data(any) Outputs: connected(bool), received(string) Config: device_name=Parakram-BLE, service_uuid=4fafc201-1fb5-459e-8fcc-c5c9c331914b, char_uuid=beb5483e-36e1-4688-b7f5-ea07361b26a8. Category: communication. Libraries: .

documents.text: HTTP Client: Make HTTP GET/POST requests with JSON parsing. Inputs: data(any), wifi_connected(bool) Outputs: response(string), status_code(int), success(bool) Config: url=http://api.example.com/data, method=POST, content_type=application/json, timeout_ms=5000. Category: communication. Libraries: bblanchon/ArduinoJson@^7.0.0.

documents.text: MQTT Client: MQTT client for publishing sensor data and subscribing to commands. Requires WiFi connection. Inputs: data(any), wifi_connected(bool) Outputs: message(string), connected(bool) Config: broker=, port=1883, topic_publish=parakram/data, topic_subscribe=parakram/cmd. Category: communication. Libraries: knolleary/PubSubClient@^2.8.

metadata.name: MQTT Client
metadata.description: MQTT client for publishing sensor data and subscribing to commands. Requires WiFi connection.

metadata.description: Network time synchronization with timezone support.

metadata.name: WebSocket Client

metadata.name: FreeRTOS EventGroup

documents.text: FreeRTOS Queue: Thread-safe message queue for inter-task data passing. Inputs: data_in(any) Outputs: data_out(any), count(int) Config: queue_name=data_queue, queue_length=10, item_size=64, timeout_ms=100. Category: freertos. Libraries: .

metadata.name: FreeRTOS Queue
metadata.description: Thread-safe message queue for inter-task data passing.

documents.text: FreeRTOS Semaphore: Mutex or binary semaphore for protecting shared resources (I2C bus, SPI, etc.). Outputs: locked(bool) Config: sem_name=i2c_mutex, sem_type=mutex, timeout_ms=1000. Category: freertos. Libraries: .

metadata.description: Mutex or binary semaphore for protecting shared resources (I2C bus, SPI, etc.).

metadata.name: FreeRTOS Task
metadata.description: Create a pinned FreeRTOS task with configurable stack, priority, and core affinity.

metadata.name: FreeRTOS Timer
metadata.description: Software timer with callback — replaces millis() polling with event-driven timing.

documents.text: AND Combinator: Outputs true only when ALL inputs are true. For multi-sensor safety interlocks. Inputs: input_1(bool), input_2(bool) Outputs: result(bool) Config: input_count=2. Category: control. Libraries: .

metadata.name: AND Combinator
metadata.description: Outputs true only when ALL inputs are true. For multi-sensor safety interlocks.

outputs.name: result
outputs.description: True if all inputs are true

metadata.name: Calibrator
metadata.description: Applies linear calibration (offset + scale) to a sensor reading.

documents.text: Hysteresis: Prevents output oscillation using separate on/off thresholds (Schmitt trigger). Inputs: value(float) Outputs: active(bool) Config: high_threshold=30.0, low_threshold=25.0. Category: control. Libraries: .

metadata.name: Hysteresis
metadata.description: Prevents output oscillation using separate on/off thresholds (Schmitt trigger).

outputs.name: active
outputs.description: True when above high threshold, false when below low

documents.text: Low Pass Filter: Exponential moving average filter for smoothing high-frequency noise. Inputs: value(float) Outputs: filtered(float) Config: alpha=0.3. Category: control. Libraries: .

metadata.description: Exponential moving average filter for smoothing high-frequency noise.

configuration.label: Alpha (0-1)
configuration.description: Smoothing factor. Lower = smoother, slower response

documents.text: Moving Average: Smooths noisy sensor data using a sliding window average. Inputs: value(float) Outputs: smoothed(float) Config: window_size=5. Category: control. Libraries: .

metadata.name: Moving Average
metadata.description: Smooths noisy sensor data using a sliding window average.

documents.text: OR Combinator: Outputs true when ANY input is true. For multi-sensor alarm triggers. Inputs: input_1(bool), input_2(bool) Outputs: result(bool) Config: input_count=2. Category: control. Libraries: .

metadata.name: OR Combinator
metadata.description: Outputs true when ANY input is true. For multi-sensor alarm triggers.

outputs.name: result
outputs.description: True if any input is true

metadata.name: PID Controller

metadata.name: Unit Converter
metadata.description: Converts between common measurement units (Celsius/Fahrenheit, meters/feet, etc.).
